name: Garden
description: Slow-tempo garden feed. Notes from a plot somewhere between zine and field journal. Posts land when the plants do something — not on a schedule. Reads like a neighbor's mailbox-left newspaper.
author: cc
source: cc 2026-04-21 — mesh v1 seed. Canonical imagined peer from CoNavHUD.astro line 61, promoted to mesh entry with richer shape. Same vibe as a PNW friend's blog.
